def positive_closure_captures_large_object_after_producing_function_returns():
    rule_id = "closure_captures_large_object_after_producing_function_returns"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Inner function or lambda captures a large local variable after the producer returns, preventing GC."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
